facebook.caption:
Two seconds. That's all you get off the blocks.

Elite swimmers know the race is decided before the first stroke — the dive, the underwater phase, the breakout. Every millisecond matters.

Jaked race suits are engineered to hold your streamline longer, so every start works harder for you.
